query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, e.id as estId, e.name as estName, 
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = e.id) as productCount
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%ssica%' OR e.name LIKE '%Big Norte%'
